
# backup slides {visibility="hidden"}

### backup slides 



## data flow limit {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowLimitNew.qmd >}}

## reassociation and data flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_reassocDataFlow.qmd >}}

## real OOO sizes {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooSkylakeSizes.qmd >}}

## predicting indirect branches {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_predict-indirect.qmd >}}

## handling branch misprediction {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_branch-mispred.qmd >}}

## handling exceptions {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_exceptions-and-ooo.qmd >}}

## BROOM pipeline {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_broomPipeline.qmd >}}

## data flow limit {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowLimit.qmd >}}

## multiple accumulator transformation {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowMult.qmd >}}

## OOO microcode (long version) {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /ooo/_oooMicrocodeSummary.qmd >}}

## data flow as loop optimization

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowLimit.qmd >}}

{{< include /ooo/_dataFlowMult.qmd >}}
